mosse.descrizione: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.
The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.
The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.
The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.
This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stats of opposing Pokémon.
The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.
The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.
The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.
A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.
The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.
The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.
The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.
Drawing power from the Eternal Flower, the user fires a powerful beam of light. This also damages the user quite a lot.
Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.
The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.
The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

abilita.descrizione: The Pokémon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its Trainer's party.
The Pokémon passes its held item to an ally that has used up an item.

items.descrizione: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder has full HP, it will endure a potential KO attack with 1 HP. The item then disappears.
An item to be held by a Pokémon. This curious scarf boosts Speed but only allows the use of one move.
One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A special Floette holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.
An item to be held by a Pokémon. It’s a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of Normal-type moves.
